Promotional and non-contractual information should not be regarded as an investment advice or investment recommendation, a solicitation of an investment an offer or a purchase.
Before any subscriptions, for further details of the risks applicable to the Fund, and on the Information (as defined below), the potential investors must read the offering documents of the Funds approved by the Autorité des Marchés Financiers (for French FCPs), by the Commission de Surveillance du Secteur Financier (“CSSF”) for the sub-funds of the Luxembourg Sicav Amundi Index Solutions (the “SICAV”) or by the Central Bank of Ireland for the sub-funds of the Irish ICAV Amundi ETF ICAV (all together the “Funds”), including the KID or the KIID for UK investors, available on amundi.com /amundietf.com or upon request to the management company headquarters.
Investment in a fund carries a substantial degree of risk (i.e. risks are detailed in the KID or the KIID for UK investors, and prospectus).
Fund’s past performance cannot be regarded as a reliable indicator for future results and are not offering any guaranteed performances.
The exactness, exhaustiveness or relevance of the information, the prevision and analysis provided is not guaranteed. It is based on sources considered as reliable and may change without prior notice. It is inevitably partial, provided based on market data stated at a particular moment and is subject to change.
This material is not intended for citizens or residents of the United States of America or to any “U.S. Person”, as this term is defined in SEC Regulation S under the U.S. Securities Act of 1933. The US person definition is indicated in the legal mentions section on amundi.com or amundietf.com, and in the prospectus of the Funds.
The information displayed above has been obtained from the Fund’s inventory account but does not represent all of the data from the inventory account. The inventory account means the accounting records detailing the Fund’s assets.
The date of calculation of the Information is specified above the table.
The above information is based, inter alia, on market data at a given moment, and thus can vary from time to time. 
The above information is published with a delay of at least three trading days compared to real-time market data. The publication of the information is therefore subject to a time lag; as such, we request that you consult the dates on which this Information is updated within the sections shown above.

security.isin:
Synthetic/Indirect replication :
The Fund is managed, using a synthetic/indirect replication approach, by investing into financial derivatives instruments, delivering the performance of the Index in exchange of the performance of the assets (which may not necessarily include the components of the Index whose performance it is seeking to replicate).

Physical/Direct replication :
- For Physical Replication in French Funds only: the Fund is managed using a physical replication approach. It consists of investing in the financial securities in the Index in proportions that equate as closely as possible to those of the Index.
- For Direct Replication in fixed income Funds in AIS only: the Fund is managed using a Direct Replication approach, mainly by making direct investments in bonds representing the Index constituents in a proportion extremely close to their proportion in the index.
- For Direct Replication in equity Funds in AIS only: the Fund is managed using a Direct Replication approach, mainly by making direct investments in securities and/or other eligible assets representing the Index constituents in a proportion extremely close to their proportion in the index.
- For Direct sampling-replication in AIS’ Funds only: the Fund is managed using a Direct Replication approach, mainly by making direct investments in securities and/or other eligible assets representing the Index constituents. It is not expected that the Fund will hold each and every underlying component of the Index at all times or hold them in the same proportion as their weightings in the Index. The Fund may also hold some securities which are not underlying components of the Index.
